tagline: Authentic Mediterranean Flavors in Los Angeles

hero.heading: Taste the Mediterranean
hero.subheading: Fresh, bold flavors crafted with love. Join us Friday through Sunday for an unforgettable dining experience on San Fernando Road.

about.heading: Our Story
paragraphs: Yassou Mediterranean brings the vibrant flavors of the Mediterranean coast to the heart of Los Angeles. Every dish we prepare is rooted in generations of culinary tradition, using only the freshest ingredients and time-honored techniques that transform simple meals into memorable experiences.

We're a weekend dinner destination where friends and families gather around the table to share incredible food. From our hand-ground hummus to our perfectly charred lamb chops, every plate tells a story of craftsmanship and passion for authentic Mediterranean cuisine.

Step inside and feel the warmth of our dining room, where the aroma of grilled meats and freshly baked pita fills the air. Whether you're celebrating a special occasion or just craving something extraordinary, Yassou is your home away from home.

reviews.name: Maria G.
reviews.text: The lamb chops are out of this world. Perfectly seasoned and grilled just right. This place is a hidden gem on San Fernando Road!

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: Amazing food and great vibes. The mixed grill platter was huge and every bite was delicious. Will definitely be coming back every weekend.

reviews.name: Samira T.
reviews.text: The hummus and falafel reminded me of home. Authentic flavors that you just can't find anywhere else in LA. Highly recommend.

reviews.name: Jason R.
reviews.text: Solid Mediterranean food at great prices. The chicken kebab was juicy and flavorful. Only wish they were open more days during the week.

reviews.name: Lena P.
reviews.text: Came here on a Friday night and had such a wonderful experience. The baklava was the perfect ending to an incredible meal. Staff was super friendly.

contact.address: 3279 N San Fernando Rd, Los Angeles, CA 90065

seo.title: Yassou Mediterranean | Authentic Mediterranean Dining in Los Angeles
seo.description: Experience authentic Mediterranean cuisine at Yassou Mediterranean in Los Angeles. Fresh hummus, grilled lamb chops, falafel, and more. Open Friday through Sunday evenings.
